value_basis: Gel-band quantification of DENV xrRNA1 in vitro; DENV1 inferred from DENV2 archetype value (nearly quantitative resistance reported by Dilweg et al. and Chapman et al.)
primary_source: Chapman et al. 2014 eLife doi:10.7554/eLife.01892 | Dilweg et al. 2021 RNA Biol 18:2321

value_basis: Direct in vitro fluorescence and gel assay of DVxrRNA1 (DENV2) — described as nearly quantitative protection; fluorescence-based MG aptamer assay confirmed high-efficiency stalling
DENV3 xrRNA1 confirmed by sfRNA Northern blot in infected cells; quantitative gel value inferred from DENV serotype comparisons showing equivalent stalling efficiency
primary_source: Villordo et al. 2016 Nucleic Acids Res | Dilweg et al. 2021 RNA Biol 18:2321

value_basis: DENV4 xrRNA1 confirmed; slightly lower xrn1 stalling efficiency noted compared to DENV2 in sfRNA production assays
primary_source: Villordo et al. 2016 Nucleic Acids Res | Dilweg et al. 2021 RNA Biol 18:2321

value_basis: ZIKV xrRNA1 crystal structure solved (PDB 5TPY); Akiyama et al. 2016 confirmed robust in vitro Xrn1 stalling; Dilweg et al. 2021 confirmed conservation across Flaviviridae
primary_source: Akiyama et al. 2016 Cell 165:1605 | Dilweg et al. 2021 RNA Biol 18:2321

value_basis: WNV Kunjin xrRNA1 (nt 10499-10574) directly tested; described as demonstrating resistance to Xrn1 in vitro; C10519G point mutation partially compromised resistance
YFV contains only one xrRNA (vs two in DENV/WNV/ZIKV); sfRNA production confirmed; stalling efficiency slightly lower than mosquito-borne class based on gel band intensity comparisons
primary_source: Chapman et al. 2014 eLife (supplemental) | Pijlman et al. 2008

value_basis: Kunjin virus is a WNV subtype; directly tested in Chapman et al. 2014 — same construct as WNV NY99 xrRNA1; value matches WNV entry above
JEV sfRNA production confirmed in infected cells; xrRNA1 stalling efficiency inferred from structural conservation with WNV Class 1 xrRNA; no standalone in vitro gel value found
primary_source: Akiyama et al. 2017 | Dilweg et al. 2021

value_basis: SLEV xrRNA1 tested by Harvey et al. 2021 in chimeric xrRNA-siRNA assay; confirmed resistance but efficiency not reported as a precise percentage; value estimated from gel band intensity description

TBEV xrRNA1 (Class 2 structure) tested in vitro by Dilweg et al. 2020 (RNA Biol); gel band confirmed; multiple stalling intermediates observed — lower apparent efficiency than Class 1 mosquito-borne viruses; Dilweg et al. report values that do not exceed 10% for loop-deletion mutants suggesting WT near 70-75%
primary_source: Dilweg et al. 2020 RNA Biol doi:10.1080/15476286.2020.1832360 | Chapman et al. 2018 Nat Commun

value_basis: HCV xrRNA structurally confirmed by Dilweg et al. 2021 (Flaviviridae-wide study); gel band shown for rodent hepacivirus and EPgV orthologs; HCV value estimated at lower end of confirmed range — structural features present but sequence divergence from flaviviral archetype reduces stalling robustness
primary_source: Dilweg et al. 2021 RNA Biol 18:2321 | Szucs et al. 2020 mBio
